- Row 54-56: white, gray, white (cols 24-26, 29-31, 34-36)
- Row 59-61: gray, white, gray (cols 24-26, 29-31, 34-36)

- (49, 29) = white (node 9)
- (54, 24) = white (node 16)
- (54, 34) = white (node 18)
- (59, 29) = white (node 21)
Let me try clicking on one of the white cells. Let me try (54, 25, 30) which is in the center-top white cell.
